author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Major Preseason Patch on July 30 - Cinematic Teaser

The Star Atlas arena shooter mode is getting its biggest update yet. This July patch brings a brand new loadout system, progression features, new weapon models, a fully finished Paizul’s Arena map, and more.

Join us on July 30 for the first Town Hall of Star Atlas Summer as we go into this update, share what’s coming next, and celebrate this milestone together!

Watch the cinematic teaser NOW: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GoC495uMiEk
